title: Undertake routine preventative maintenance
competent_person_statement: A competent person in Undertake routine preventative maintenance demonstrates consistent performance across all elements and performance criteria in a workplace context.

elements.title: Prepare for and conduct routine checks of plant and equipment

pcs.text: Identify workplace health and safety hazards relevant to task, and address associated risk
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify workplace health and safety hazards relevant to task, and address associated risk?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify workplace health and safety hazards relevant to task, and address associated risk.

pcs.text: Perform visual checks of plant and equipment to detect signs of defects and damage in accordance with preventative maintenance documentation and procedures
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Perform visual checks of plant and equipment to detect signs of defects and damage in accordance with preventative maintenance documentation and procedures?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Perform visual checks of plant and equipment to detect signs of defects and damage in accordance with preventative maintenance documentation and procedures.

pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Apply isolation procedures where required?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Apply isolation procedures where required.

pcs.text: Make requirements for the adjustments and repairs to plant and equipment within workplace procedures and agreements
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Make requirements for the adjustments and repairs to plant and equipment within workplace procedures and agreements?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Make requirements for the adjustments and repairs to plant and equipment within workplace procedures and agreements.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E1: Prepare for and conduct routine checks of plant and equipment

elements.title: Implement routine preventative maintenance

pcs.text: Make routine adjustments and repairs to plant and equipment within workplace procedures and agreements
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Make routine adjustments and repairs to plant and equipment within workplace procedures and agreements?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Make routine adjustments and repairs to plant and equipment within workplace procedures and agreements.

pcs.text: Carry out greasing, lubrication and other regular servicing of plant and equipment in accordance with workplace schedules, procedures and agreements, and according to maintenance instructions
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Carry out greasing, lubrication and other regular servicing of plant and equipment in accordance with workplace schedules, procedures and agreements, and according to maintenance instructions?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Carry out greasing, lubrication and other regular servicing of plant and equipment in accordance with workplace schedules, procedures and agreements, and according to maintenance instructions.

pcs.text: Return cleaned equipment to operating order after maintenance is complete
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Return cleaned equipment to operating order after maintenance is complete?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Return cleaned equipment to operating order after maintenance is complete.

pcs.text: Identify, rectify and/or report out-of-specification preventative maintenance
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify, rectify and/or report out-of-specification preventative maintenance?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify, rectify and/or report out-of-specification preventative maintenance.

pcs.text: Collect, treat and dispose of or recycle waste arising from preventative maintenance according to company procedures
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Collect, treat and dispose of or recycle waste arising from preventative maintenance according to company procedures?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Collect, treat and dispose of or recycle waste arising from preventative maintenance according to company procedures.

pcs.text: Record and report routine maintenance information following workplace procedures
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Record and report routine maintenance information following workplace procedures?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Record and report routine maintenance information following workplace procedures.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E2: Implement routine preventative maintenance

evidence_guide.title: Third Party Report — Workplace Supervisor (Required)
evidence_guide.description: Completed by your direct supervisor — the strongest evidence item for RPL.

evidence_guide.title: Position description
evidence_guide.description: Your current position description showing duties relevant to this unit.
